nasb.text: Therefore behold, days are coming When I will punish the idols of Babylon; And her whole land will be put to shame And all her slain will fall in her midst.

esv.text: “Therefore, behold, the days are coming when I will punish the images of Babylon; her whole land shall be put to shame, and all her slain shall fall in the midst of her.

cnv.text: 因此，你看，日子快到， 我必懲罰巴比倫的偶像； 巴比倫全地都必蒙羞， 所有被刺殺的人都必倒在境內。

ccb.text: “看啊，时候将到，我必惩罚巴比伦的神像， 使巴比伦全国蒙羞， 尸横遍野。
